nodes.title: REQUIREMENTS
widgets_values:
## Workflow Prerequisites ##

This workflow requires the following custom nodes, which can be obtained via ComfyUI-Manager:

  * Z-Image Power Nodes: https://github.com/martin-rizzo/ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes
  * ComfyUI-GGUF       : https://github.com/city96/ComfyUI-GGUF

 Additionally, ensure you have the following 3 models downloaded and placed in their respective
 directories within your ComfyUI installation:

  z_image_turbo-Q5_K_S.gguf
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/jayn7/Z-Image-Turbo-GGUF/blob/main/z_image_turbo-Q5_K_S.gguf
    * Local Directory: `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models/`

  Qwen3-4B-Q8_0.gguf
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-4B-GGUF/blob/main/Qwen3-4B-Q8_0.gguf
    * Local Directory: `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders/`

  ae.safetensors
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/blob/main/split_files/vae/ae.safetensors
    * Local Directory: `Comfyui/models/vae/`

## More Info ##

- https://github.com/martin-rizzo/ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes
- https://civitai.com/models/2322533/z-image-power-nodes

Created by Martin Rizzo
  GitHub : https://github.com/martin-rizzo
  CivitAI: https://civitai.com/user/Photographer
  Reddit : https://www.reddit.com/user/FotografoVirtual

nodes.title: README
widgets_values: This workflow generates a 5-step 'intensity' showcase to demonstrate how this parameter tweaks the contrast and saturation of the final image. I use this figure in the README so you can see at a glance how adjusting the intensity changes the look and feel of your output.

A woman with blue skin stands with arms crossed, wearing a white bandeau top and white shorts. Gold accents adorn the woman's arms, waist, and ankles. The waist is further embellished with a wide, ornate gold belt featuring blue jewels. The woman's hair is a voluminous, bright blue, styled into two high pigtails adorned with gold accessories, and it cascades down her back and sides in long, flowing strands. The background shows a wooden shelf filled with various bottles and jars, and a fireplace with flames. To the left, a tall, ornate gold urn emits white smoke. The floor appears to be a rough, textured surface.
